zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Cooke於1542年出生在英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾時，她的父親Sir. Anthony Cooke37歲，母親Anne FitzWilliam38歲。她於1565年11月4日與Sir Henry Killigrew在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 彼得 勒 波爾 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 芬克結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年12月27日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Cooke于1542年出生在英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir. Anthony Cooke37岁，母亲Anne FitzWilliam38岁。她于1565年11月4日与Sir Henry Killigrew在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 彼得 勒 波爾 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 芬克结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年12月27日在英国英格兰倫敦享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Cooke was born in 1542, in Gidea Hall, Essex, England, her father, Sir. Anthony Cooke, was 37 and her mother, Anne FitzWilliam, was 38. She married Sir Henry Killigrew on 4 November 1565, in London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 27 December 1583, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Cooke est née en 1542, à Gidea Hall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir. Anthony Cooke, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne FitzWilliam, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Killigrew le 4 novembre 1565, à London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1583, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Cooke è nata il nel 1542 nel Gidea Hall, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir. Anthony Cooke, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Anne FitzWilliam, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Killigrew il 4 novembre 1565, nel London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1583, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Cookeが1542年にイギリスエセックスギディー ハルで生まれた時，父Sir. Anthony Cookeは37歳，母Anne FitzWilliamは38歳であった。1565年11月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ペター ル ポエル ウィス スト ベンエット フィンクでSir Henry Killigrewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年12月27日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マリー アルデルマリー ウィス スト ソマス ス アポストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Thomas The Apostle, City of London: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더마이 위스 스트 톰아스 테 아포스틀
ko.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Cooke(이)가 1542년 영국 에세스 지디 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir. Anthony Cooke(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne FitzWilliam(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1565년 11월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크에서 Sir Henry Killigrew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더마이 위스 스트 톰아스 테 아포스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Cooke nasceu em 1542, em Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir. Anthony Cooke, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne FitzWilliam, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Killigrew em 4 de novembro de 1565, em London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1583, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: лондон ст питир л поир вит ст бинет финк, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Cooke родилась в 1542 г. в местности гидеа холл, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir. Anthony Cooke было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne FitzWilliam, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Killigrew 4 ноября 1565 г. в местности лондон ст питир л поир вит ст бинет финк, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 декабря 1583 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ст мэри алдирмэри вит ст томас т апостл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Cooke nació en 1542, en Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir. Anthony Cooke, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anne FitzWilliam, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Killigrew el 4 de noviembre de 1565, en London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1583, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
